title: SPARTA Crypto-D1 Readiness Gate / Operator Checklist v1
research_objective: Audit the completed Crypto-D1 specification + tooling stack (Bundles 11 through 20) and produce a single conservative readiness verdict for whether SPARTA is ready to accept real operator-supplied Crypto-D1 data. This gate authorizes nothing operational: no data fetch, no exchange connection, no QA against real data, no backtest, no paper/live trading. It only reports the readiness status and the concrete missing items. NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA is the honest default. Specification completeness is not data readiness.
readiness_decision: The Crypto-D1 specification + tooling foundation is COMPLETE: all 10 Bundle 11-20 artifacts exist, all associated validators pass, and every fetch / connection / execution / dataset-processing / scheduler / network / credential flag is pinned False. But No real data has entered SPARTA. No concrete operator data source is selected, no license/TOS is confirmed, no real data has been fetched, data/crypto_d1_research/ does not exist, no manifest.json / CHECKSUMS.txt / FREEZE_RECORD.txt / fees.json exists, no QA run has happened against real data, there is no QA_PASS or accepted QA_WARN, and no baseline backtest output exists. Therefore the only honest verdict is NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA. Specification completeness is not data readiness. Crypto-D1 remains WATCH / MIXED.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: execution / fetch / connection flags pinned False; research_only.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Phase P0 -- defines the Crypto-D1 lane (BTC/ETH/SOL spot, 1d, 24/7), strategy families, IS/OOS gates, and PASS/WATCH/FAIL rules.
remaining_limitations: Pure research; no live data; no backtest authorized.

audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Defines required data shape (9 CSV columns, provenance, quote currency), allowed/forbidden sources, and the minimum viable dataset.
remaining_limitations: No data acquired; contract is an input spec only.

audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Defines the schema every future per-dataset manifest must satisfy plus the freeze model.
remaining_limitations: No real dataset declared; no real manifest authored beyond the spec.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: execution / fetch / dataset-processing flags pinned False.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Defines the QA check groups, the 6-status QA model, the freeze rules, and the 'QA_PASS authorizes nothing' rule.
remaining_limitations: Spec only; no QA has been run against real data.

audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Defines the future baseline backtest design (families, IS/OOS split, cost model, report schema). Plan only.
remaining_limitations: No backtest has been run; no baseline output exists.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: runner is offline; no network, no broker; runs only against operator-supplied frozen local data when separately authorized.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: The offline backtest runner implementation. It has NOT been run against real data; no real dataset exists to run it on.
remaining_limitations: No real dataset present; runner has not been executed against real data; no baseline output exists.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: fetch / connection / credential flags pinned False.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: The acquisition authorization gate: the named operator gates that must be satisfied before any real data may enter.
remaining_limitations: The operator-side gates are NOT satisfied: no source chosen, no license confirmed, no data acquired.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: fetch / connection flags pinned False; classes E + F REJECTED for evidence.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: Evaluates 6 source classes (A/B/C/D acceptable-or-watch; E/F rejected); class C PREFERRED. PREFERRED is not APPROVED.
remaining_limitations: No concrete source named or operator-approved.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: no network, no broker; reads only an operator-supplied on-disk dataset directory when run.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: The QA runtime tool that validates an on-disk frozen dataset and emits a QA verdict. It has NOT been run against real data.
remaining_limitations: No real dataset exists; no QA run executed; no QA_PASS / accepted QA_WARN.

audited_artifacts.safety_flags_status: eleven safety flags pinned False; research_only + read_only.
audited_artifacts.role_in_pipeline: The human operator procedure bridging the Bundle 17 gate to the Bundle 19 QA tool. Documentation only; adds no automation.
remaining_limitations: The operator has not yet executed the runbook; no data has been placed.

readiness_questions.question: Are all required Crypto-D1 specs/tools/runbooks present?
readiness_questions.detail: All 10 Bundle 11-20 artifacts exist on disk and their validators pass.

readiness_questions.question: Are all Bundle 17 authorization gates satisfied?
readiness_questions.detail: The operator-side acquisition gates are not satisfied; no operator acquisition decision has been recorded.

readiness_questions.question: Has the operator selected a concrete data source?
readiness_questions.detail: No concrete vendor / venue / archive has been named or approved.

readiness_questions.question: Is the source class acceptable under Bundle 18?
readiness_questions.detail: No source class chosen. Acceptable classes are A/B/C/D (C PREFERRED); E/F are REJECTED for evidence.

readiness_questions.question: Is there license/TOS confirmation?
readiness_questions.detail: No license / TOS reference recorded.

readiness_questions.question: Are the required assets confirmed (BTC, ETH, SOL)?
readiness_questions.detail: Scope fixes BTC/ETH/SOL spot, but no concrete dataset declaring them exists.

readiness_questions.question: Is market type confirmed as spot only?
readiness_questions.detail: Spec mandates spot only; no dataset declared to confirm against.

readiness_questions.question: Is timeframe confirmed as 1d only?
readiness_questions.detail: Spec mandates 1d only; intraday out of scope; no dataset declared.

readiness_questions.question: Is the date range specified?
readiness_questions.detail: No time_start / time_end specified by any operator dataset.

readiness_questions.question: Is dataset_id specified?
readiness_questions.detail: No CRYPTO_D1_SPOT_<SYMBOLS_TAG>_V<NNN> dataset_id declared.

readiness_questions.question: Is dataset version specified?
readiness_questions.detail: No dataset_version declared.

readiness_questions.question: Is storage path specified?
readiness_questions.detail: Path pattern data/crypto_d1_research/<dataset_id>/<dataset_version>/ is defined; no concrete path exists and the directory has not been created.

readiness_questions.question: Is file naming convention specified?
readiness_questions.detail: Convention <asset>_daily.csv is defined in the spec; no real files exist.

readiness_questions.question: Are sha256 checksums ready?
readiness_questions.detail: No CHECKSUMS.txt; no dataset files to checksum.

readiness_questions.question: Are manifest.json, CHECKSUMS.txt, FREEZE_RECORD.txt, and fees/slippage declaration ready?
readiness_questions.detail: None of these operator files exist; no fees.json with taker fee + slippage.

readiness_questions.question: Has the QA Runtime Tool been run?
readiness_questions.detail: No QA run against real data has happened; no qa_report.json exists for a real dataset.

readiness_questions.question: Is there a QA_PASS or accepted QA_WARN?
readiness_questions.detail: No QA verdict exists because no QA has been run on real data.

readiness_questions.question: Is there any baseline backtest output?
readiness_questions.detail: No baseline backtest has been run; no per-strategy report output exists.

readiness_questions.question: Is paper/live/micro-live still locked?
readiness_questions.detail: Paper, live, and micro-live remain locked. This gate authorizes none of them.

readiness_questions.question: What is the final readiness status?
readiness_questions.detail: No operator-supplied dataset exists, no source is concretely authorized, no data has been fetched, no data folder exists, no QA run has happened, and no baseline results exist.

required_artifact_checks: All 10 audited_artifacts have their fetch / connection / execution / dataset-processing safety posture documented.
Word discipline preserved: NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA is the honest default; specification completeness is not data readiness.
missing_items: Operator decision to acquire this cycle (a research decision, not a default).
Concrete source class (A/B/C/D; never E/F) chosen under Bundle 18.
Concrete dataset declaring BTC/ETH/SOL spot at 1d.
Concrete storage path under data/crypto_d1_research/ (created only by operator action).
fees.json with per-venue taker fee + slippage.
CHECKSUMS.txt with sha256 per dataset file.
FREEZE_RECORD.txt with freeze_timestamp_utc + operator + version pins.
A QA run via tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py producing qa_report.json.
A QA_PASS or operator-accepted QA_WARN verdict.
A separately authorized baseline backtest output.
allowed_next_steps: Operator step (NOT a bundle): follow the Bundle 20 runbook to choose a source class (A/B/C/D), acquire BTC/ETH/SOL daily-spot CSV offline, place files under data/crypto_d1_research/<dataset_id>/<dataset_version>/, author manifest.json + CHECKSUMS.txt + FREEZE_RECORD.txt + fees.json, then run the Bundle 19 QA tool and review the qa_report.
Alternative: keep Crypto-D1 in WATCH and prioritize a different research lane; the specification foundation needs no further spec work to be complete.
Re-run this readiness gate after any operator action to recompute the readiness status.
forbidden_next_steps: Do NOT fetch data of any kind from this gate.
Do NOT connect to any exchange from this gate.
Do NOT run any QA against real data from this gate.
Do NOT run any backtest from this gate.
Do NOT create data/crypto_d1_research/ from this gate.
Do NOT place any order anywhere.
Do NOT enable live or micro-live trading.
Do NOT install any credentials / API keys / .env / private keys.
Do NOT install any scheduler / cron / daemon.
Do NOT mark the Crypto-D1 lane ACTIVE or STRONG.
Do NOT claim profitability, edge, or live-readiness.

readiness_status_rules.NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA: The honest default. The specification stack is complete and safe, but no operator data source is concretely authorized, no license/TOS confirmed, no data fetched, no data folder exists, no QA run, and no baseline results. Specification completeness is not data readiness.
readiness_status_rules.READY_FOR_OPERATOR_DATA_INTAKE: Reachable only after the operator records a concrete source class (A/B/C/D), source_name, and license/TOS reference, and confirms BTC/ETH/SOL spot 1d scope. Reaching this status authorizes nothing automatically; intake remains a manual operator action under the Bundle 17 gates.
readiness_status_rules.READY_FOR_QA_RUN: Reachable only after the operator has placed real frozen data + manifest.json + CHECKSUMS.txt + FREEZE_RECORD.txt + fees.json on disk. The QA run itself remains a separate manual operator action.
readiness_status_rules.READY_FOR_BASELINE_BACKTEST_REVIEW: Reachable only after a QA_PASS (or operator-accepted QA_WARN) on real data AND a separately authorized backtest has produced output. QA_PASS does not authorize automatic backtesting by itself.
readiness_status_rules.BLOCKED: A required artifact is missing, a validator fails, a safety flag is unsafe, or an external block is declared. No downstream use until cleared.

data_intake_gate.name: Future operator data-intake gate
all_required: exact_source_class_from_bundle_18 (A / B / C / D only -- never E web-scraped, never F manual/screenshots)

trading_gate.name: Future paper / live / micro-live trading gate
trading_gate.note: This gate does NOT authorize trading and never will. A separate future authorization stack would be required, and even then only after multi-bundle evidence exists. QA_PASS does not authorize live trading. QA_PASS does not authorize paper trading.

data_intake_gate: See future_authorization_requirements.data_intake_gate. NOT authorized by this readiness gate.
qa_run_gate: See future_authorization_requirements.qa_run_gate. NOT authorized by this readiness gate.
backtest_gate: See future_authorization_requirements.backtest_gate. NOT authorized by this readiness gate.
trading_gate: See future_authorization_requirements.trading_gate. EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN by this readiness gate.

lane_recommendation.rationale: The Crypto-D1 specification + tooling foundation is COMPLETE. No real data has entered SPARTA. No evidence exists. The next move is OPERATOR-DRIVEN: either follow the Bundle 20 runbook to bring in a real dataset, or keep the lane in WATCH.

safety_boundaries: Research-only. Readiness gate / operator checklist only.
No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No paper-order execution. No order placement.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this gate's runtime.
No data fetch in this bundle. No QA run against real data in this bundle. No backtest in this bundle.
Do not create data/crypto_d1_research/. Do not modify paper / live execution files.
Do not claim profitability. Do not claim live-readiness. Do not claim STRONG evidence.
NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA is the honest default. Specification completeness is not data readiness. Crypto-D1 remains WATCH / MIXED.
no_profit_claim_policy: A readiness gate is not strategy validation.
Specification completeness is not data readiness.
QA_PASS does not authorize automatic backtesting.
QA_PASS does not authorize paper trading.
QA_PASS does not authorize live trading.
No real data has entered SPARTA.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
